assumptions: The adapter faithfully exposes the object-state realization.
Responses are complete inside the child-process boundary.

implementation.buildInstructions: No build step; use the pinned Nix Python.
implementation.executionInstructions: Launch one fresh adapter process per scenario.

limitations: Evidence covers only the exact six-scenario campaign.
No wall-clock, concurrency, network, crash, token-security, or exhaustive-trace claim.
